blocks.text: Weng soars in Falun — first win in four years, Tottenham's crisis deepens
United unbeaten under Carrick and now third — but the real title race is Arsenal vs City, just two points apart. It resumes Wednesday: Arsenal at Brighton, City hosting Forest.
🎿 Thu 16:05 — Biathlon World Cup: Tandrevold, Røiseland & Kirkeeide in Women's 15km Individual, Kontiolahti
⚽ Wed 21:00 — Copa del Rey El Derbi Vasco: Athletic Club vs Real Sociedad, trailing 1-0 on aggregate
